title: acmispon maritimus
intro: Acmispon maritimus, also known as Beach Pea or Salt-pea, is a perennial legume plant native to the coastal areas of western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Acmispon maritimus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies for its potential to alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.
